narrative:
Deerfield Township has 27,655 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.7 percentage points.
